title: Minimalist Spice Texture
promptText: A photo of three bowls filled with spices on dark wood, each containing one type of turmeric powder, cumin powder, and paprika powder, arranged in an artistic manner. The focus is on the rich colors and textures of these seasonings, illuminated by soft lighting to highlight their intricate details. Shot from above with a Sony Alpha A7 III camera using a Canon EF 24–70mm f/2.8 lens at ISO 65.
